package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_network_calls_transport_without_connection_limits: Layer: Network calls. Flag custom http.Transport values missing MaxIdleConns or MaxIdleConnsPerHost for service clients.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario573Positive(urls []string) int {
	total := 0
	for _, url := range urls {
		client := &http.Client{}
		resp, err := client.Get(url)
		if err == nil { total += resp.StatusCode }
	}
	return total
}
